news.headline: Germany's conservatives, SPD and Greens have reached a compromise on debt deal - RND newspaper
AECOM named Official Venue Infrastructure Partner for Los Angeles 2028 Olympic Games, providing services for 50+ venues.
news.summary: AECOM (NYSE: ACM), a leading global infrastructure corporation, has been designated as the Official Venue Infrastructure Partner for the upcoming LA28 Olympic and Paralympic Games as well as Team USA. Their involvement spans infrastructure architecture, engineering, planning, program management, and construction management services. AECOM's support will encompass the extensive execution of the venue infrastructure program for the Games, which is set to showcase over 50 Olympic events.

news.headline: Bonterra Energy achieves record production in 2024, with 14,846 BOE per day on average, 5% growth YoY. Funds flow at $118.7M. Net debt at $167.2M. Charlie Lake asset has 2,100 BOE per day production, Montney well producing 575 BOE per day. Reserves growth of 5-6%. Refinanced debt with $135M Senior Secured Second Lien Notes. Operations update on various wells provided.
news.summary: Bonterra Energy Corp. has reported its financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2024. Production in 2024 averaged 14,846 barrels of oil equivalent (BOE) per day, a five percent year-over-year growth. Funds Flow and Adjusted Free Funds Flow for 2024 totaled $118.7 million and $10.5 million, respectively. Net Debt stood at $167.2 million at year-end. Reserves grew by five percent in Proved Developed Producing, six percent in Total Proved, and five percent in Total Proved plus Probable categories. Bonterra acquired the Charlie Lake Assets for $23.6 million in cash in 2024. The company's Charlie Lake asset has achieved production rates of approximately 2,100 BOE per day, including 685 barrels of light crude oil. The Montney asset, with a first well producing 575 BOE per day, is also showing promising results. Bonterra refinanced its debt post-year end with $135 million of Senior Secured Second Lien Notes. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Harts Plumbers, Electricians, & HVAC Technicians advise on Fix-a-Leak Week. Founded in 2013, Tacoma-based provider offers expert tips.
news.summary: A leading home services provider based in Tacoma is emphasizing the importance of homeowners remaining vigilant in monitoring for leaks to prevent expensive repairs. Harts Plumbers, Electricians & HVAC Technicians, established in 2013 and highly rated, is prompting this reminder. It is crucial for homeowners to regularly inspect for leaks as unnoticed issues can lead to significant costs down the line.

news.headline: Deljo Heating, Cooling & Plumbing in Chicago launched new plumbing services, marking a century of comfort for customers.
news.summary: A prominent home service company in Chicago celebrated over 100 years of providing comfort by offering a wide array of services. On March 14, 2025, Deljo Heating, Cooling & Plumbing revealed their expansion plans, reinforcing their position as the top choice for home services in the Chicago region.

news.headline: Hot Chili Limited adds La Verde Copper Mine, confirms significant Cu-Au discovery in Costa Fuego. Pre-feasibility study in final stages.
news.summary: Perth, Australia - On March 14, 2025, Hot Chili announced the acquisition of the former La Verde Copper Mine (La Verde) to its Costa Fuego coastal copper hub. The company also confirmed a noteworthy Cu-Au porphyry discovery. The Costa Fuego Cu-Au Pre-feasibility Study (PFS) has reached its final stages, showcasing promising developments.

news.headline: R1 and Palantir partner to launch R37 AI lab for healthcare finance, aiming to revolutionize performance.
news.summary: R1, a renowned revenue cycle management company with more than 20 years of experience, has joined forces with Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ:PLTR), a prominent artificial intelligence firm. Together, they have established R37, a cutting-edge AI lab aimed at transforming healthcare financial operations. Leveraging R1's extensive knowledge in payer-provider interactions and advanced technology with Palantir's state-of-the-art AI technology, the lab will work on developing innovative solutions. This partnership brings together two industry leaders to drive advancements in healthcare finance.

news.headline: Inspira Technologies announces major milestones in respiratory care. Letter from CEO on March 14, 2025. Nasdaq: IINN.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, in Ra'anana, Israel, the CEO of Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd. released a letter. Inspira Technologies, a company at the forefront of respiratory support and real-time blood-monitoring, based out of Ra'anana, Israel, shared significant updates. As a Nasdaq-listed company under the ticker symbol IINN, Inspira Technologies continues to innovate in the field of healthcare technology.

news.headline: Wayfair to open new 150,000-square-foot store in Atlanta in 2026, second large-format store in the city.
news.summary: In Boston on March 14, 2025, Wayfair Inc. (NYSE: W), a leading home goods retailer, unveiled plans for its newest large-format store in Atlanta, Georgia. Scheduled to launch in 2026, this expansive store will cover 150,000 square feet, providing customers with a comprehensive and interactive shopping experience.

news.headline: WOW reports strong Q4 & 2024 results, with 16.6% penetration rates in Greenfield Markets. NYSE: WOW. #broadband #finance
news.summary: In 2024, the penetration rates saw a rise to 16.6% in Greenfield Markets, located in Englewood, Colorado. WideOpenWest, Inc. (NYSE: WOW), a top broadband provider in the country, noted this increase. The company boasts an advanced network that reaches around 2.0 million users.

news.headline: HitPaw Edimakor 3.6.0 introduces AI-powered features: Image-to-Video, Talking Animals, and AI Clip Maker.
news.summary: HitPaw Edimakor is excited to release version 3.6.0 of its AI video editing software in New York on March 14, 2025. This update includes three groundbreaking features aimed at enhancing video content creation. This latest version is designed to convert still images into engaging videos.

news.headline: Beasley Broadcast Group (Nasdaq: BBGI) to report 2024 financial results on March 20, 2025, before market opens.
news.summary: Beasley Broadcast Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BBGI), a media company based in Naples, Florida, disclosed that it will release its financial results for the full year of 2024 on Thursday, March 20, 2025. The report will be made public before the market opens.

news.headline: CNB Community Bancorp, Inc. raised quarterly cash dividend to $0.30/share from previous $0.29/share.
news.summary: CNB Community Bancorp, Inc., based in Hillsdale, Michigan, revealed on March 14, 2025, that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend for the company's common stock. The dividend has been set at $0.30 per share, marking a $0.01 increase compared to the previous dividend payout. This announcement was made by CNB Community Bancorp, Inc., traded on the OTCQX under the ticker symbol CNBB.

news.headline: Advancements with Ted Danson to showcase the transformation of workplace productivity using behavioral data.
news.summary: Discover how the utilization of behavioral data is revolutionizing the decision-making process for leaders amidst the intricate talent environment. Scheduled to air from JUPITER, Fla., on March 14, 2025, an upcoming installment of Advancements with Ted Danson will delve into the latest advancements in HR software. The episode aims to highlight the impact of technology in empowering decision-makers to navigate the complexities of the talent landscape effectively.

news.headline: Keeper Security enhances Partner Program with new training, incentives & resources to boost revenue. - Chicago, March 14, 2025.
news.summary: The Keeper Partner Program has launched new training materials, incentives, and resources to meet the increasing demand for privileged access management and boost revenue growth. This initiative aims to capitalize on the rising trend in cybersecurity. The program was unveiled in Chicago on March 14, 2025, by Keeper Security. This leading cybersecurity provider focuses on zero-trust and enhanced protection measures. Partnering with this program presents lucrative opportunities for businesses looking to strengthen their security capabilities.

news.headline: Virginia patient advocate Patrick Gee, PhD, JLC, founder of iAdvocate, wins NKF's Celeste Lee Patient Engagement Award.
news.summary: A Healthcare Consultant and founder of iAdvocate, Patrick Gee, PhD, JLC, has been granted the Celeste Lee Patient Engagement Award by the National Kidney Foundation (NKF). The award ceremony is scheduled to take place during the upcoming 2025 Spring Clinical Meetings.

news.headline: First Mining amends agreement with First Majestic to expedite Springpole silver stream payment; updating terms. TSX: FF, OTCQX: FFMGF, FRANKFURT: FMG.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on March 14, 2025, First Mining Gold Corp. disclosed an agreement amendment with First Majestic Silver Corp. The company, listed on TSX under FF and OTCQX as FFMGF, along with Frankfurt exchange as FMG, entered into the "Amending Agreement."

news.headline: Keystone appoints Andy Gandhi as Senior Partner to lead Technical Investigations Practice and expand global presence.
news.summary: Keystone has recently appointed Andy Gandhi as the Senior Partner and Global Head of the Technical Investigations Practice as well as the leader of Keystone MENA and South Asia. This appointment was made on March 14, 2025. Andy Gandhi will be based in Dubai and will play a key role in overseeing the company's operations in these regions. This strategic move aims to enhance Keystone's presence and influence globally.

news.headline: Life Time introduces 60XT Challenge with $200,000 in prizes. Top five finishers get $10K each. Starts March 24.
news.summary: In Chanhassen, Minnesota, on March 14, 2025, Life Time (NYSE: LTH) announced the initiation of a new fitness program called 60XT. This eight-week challenge aims to help participants improve their health and offers them the opportunity to compete for prizes. Starting on March 24th, individuals can embark on this transformation journey in preparation for the summer season.

news.headline: Garmin celebrates World Sleep Day, notes users sleeping better with Garmin Connect; promoting benefits of good sleep.
news.summary: Data from Garmin Connect indicates that users' sleep quality has improved significantly over the past year. This information was shared by Garmin in Olathe, Kansas on March 14, 2025. The company, listed on the NYSE as GRMN, is commemorating World Sleep Day by highlighting the various features of Garmin smartwatches that can assist users in recognizing the benefits of adequate sleep.

news.headline: The Designery's Coastal Alabama location grand opening on March 25 will include food, music, giveaways.
news.summary: On March 25, the owner Reggie Pulliam will host a special event at The Designery in Gulf Shores, Alabama. This immersive showroom offers services for kitchen, bath, and closet designs with top-notch cabinets, countertops, and flooring options. During the event, guests can enjoy food, music, giveaways, and more.

news.headline: NCAA faces criticism over flawed plan to regulate college athletes' pay; concerns raised about fairness.
Green Thumb's RISE Dispensary Whitehall opening, 6th in Ohio, 1st in Columbus, 103rd in US, post-August 2024 sales start.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, RISE Dispensaries, a cannabis retail chain owned by Green Thumb Industries Inc., opened a new location in Whitehall, OH, at 4141 E Broad St. This marks their entry into the Columbus area and is their sixth dispensary in Ohio and 103rd nationwide. This is the first RISE Dispensary in Ohio since adult-use sales began in August 2024.

news.headline: FangDD in China announces a US$5,000,000 senior convertible notes offering with 5% original issue discount and additional 251,890 Class A ordinary shares.
news.summary: Shenzhen, China, March 14, 2025 - Fangdd Network Group Ltd. (Nasdaq: DUO), a property technology company in China, has recently unveiled a securities purchase agreement with select investors. This agreement entails the offering of senior 5% original issue discount convertible promissory notes totaling US$5,000,000, along with Class A ordinary shares with a par value of US$0.0005625 per share that may be issued upon conversion under the Notes. Furthermore, an additional 251,890 Class A ordinary shares are slated for issuance alongside the Notes.

news.headline: Skye Bioscience (Nasdaq: SKYE) to announce 2024 financial results on March 20th; conference call at 1:30pm PT/4:30pm ET.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Skye Bioscience, Inc. (Nasdaq: SKYE) will hold a conference call on March 20th at 1:30 p.m. PT/4:30 p.m. ET to review its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company, a clinical-stage biotechnology firm targeting new therapeutic strategies for obesity and metabolic health disorders, will release an earnings statement post-market closure on the same day.

news.headline: Iridex from Mountain View, CA (NASDAQ: IRIX) addresses recent stock price movement due to volatility in market.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, in Mountain View, California, Iridex Corporation (NASDAQ: IRIX), a prominent global provider of laser-based medical systems for managing glaucoma and retinal diseases, addressed the fluctuations in its recent stock price.

news.headline: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. (NASDAQ: LIEN) declares $0.34 cash dividend for Q1 2025, as announced on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. revealed a cash dividend of $0.34 per share for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. This specialty finance company, listed as LIEN on NASDAQ, operates as a business development company and made this announcement following a board of directors meeting.

news.headline: Apollo Silver Corp. engages Danayi Capital for investor relations and digital marketing services in Vancouver for US$50,000 trial period.
news.summary: Vancouver, BC - On March 14, 2025, Apollo Silver Corp. (TSX.V: APGO, OTCQB: APGOF, Frankfurt: 6ZF0) announced their partnership with Danayi Capital Corp. to receive investor relations and digital marketing services. Danayi, based in Vancouver, specializes in marketing for the mining and metals industry. The digital marketing agreement, effective March 13, 2025, will run for one month at a cost of US$50,000, offering digital media, marketing strategies, and advertising. The Company has the option to extend the agreement based on its discretion, pending approval from the TSX Venture Exchange and compliance with relevant securities laws.

news.headline: Wallbridge Mining begins drilling at Martiniere gold project, located 30 km west of Fenelon in Quebec. TSX: WM, OTCQB: WLBMF.
news.summary: Wallbridge Mining Company Limited (TSX: WM, OTCQB: WLBMF) has begun drilling at its Martiniere gold project, situated about 30 km west of the Fenelon gold project in northwestern Quebec. This drilling initiative marks a significant step for the Company as it aims to explore and potentially expand its resource base in the region. The proximity of the Martiniere project to the flagship Fenelon gold project offers strategic benefits for Wallbridge, enhancing operational efficiencies and maximizing the utilization of existing infrastructure. Investors and stakeholders eagerly anticipate the results of this latest drilling campaign, which could have a substantial impact on the Company's future growth and development.

news.headline: Mirasol Resources secured a $2 million loan from director John Tognetti at 10% interest, repayable in one year for general expenses.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on March 14, 2025, Mirasol Resources Ltd. shared news of securing a loan worth $2,000,000 from Mr. John Tognetti, who is a director and control person of Mirasol. The loan has an interest rate of 10% per year, with a one-year repayment term, allowing early repayment without penalties, and is backed by a General Security Agreement. Mirasol plans to utilize the loan amount mainly for settling debts with unrelated parties and for general operational expenses.

news.headline: Plymouth Industrial REIT declares $0.24 dividend per share for Q1 2025, $0.96 annually, payable on April 30.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Plymouth Industrial REIT, Inc. disclosed a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.24 per common stock share for Q1 2025, totaling an annualized rate of $0.96 per common share. This dividend will be paid on April 30, 2025, to stockholders recorded as of March 31, 2025. The company operates under the NYSE symbol PLYM and is headquartered in Boston.

news.headline: CareCloud declares dividends for 8.75% Series A and B preferred stock for March and April 2025.
news.summary: Today in Somerset, New Jersey, CareCloud, Inc., a prominent healthcare technology and AI solutions company for medical practices and health systems across the country, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved monthly cash dividends for its preferred stocks. The dividends include those for the 8.75% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock and the 8.75% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock for the months of March and April 2025. CareCloud, trading under Nasdaq symbols CCLD, CCLDO, and CCLDP, continues to solidify its position in the healthcare technology sector with these financial decisions.

news.headline: StorageVault Canada Inc. declares Q1 2025 dividend of $0.002946 per share, payable on April 15, 2025.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, StorageVault Canada Inc. revealed the declaration of a quarterly dividend of $0.002946 per common share. Shareholders of record on March 31, 2025, will receive the dividend on April 15, 2025. The ex-dividend date is also set for March 31, 2025. This dividend is classified as an "eligible dividend" for Canadian income tax purposes.

news.headline: Gogo reports strong financial results for Q4 and full year 2024: Total Revenue $137.8M (up 41%) and Q4 Service Revenue $118.8M (up 47%).
news.summary: In the latest financial report, the company generated a total revenue of $137.8 million, marking a significant 41% increase compared to the previous year. Specifically, in the fourth quarter, the service revenue totaled $118.8 million, showing a remarkable 47% growth year-over-year. These impressive numbers indicate a strong performance and positive trends for the company's financial results.

news.headline: Pump.fun memecoins dwindling, less than 1% graduate to Solana DEX. Weekly tokens drop to 1,500 average. Memecoin market woes affect crypto market cap down $1 trillion. Bitcoin could dip to $73,000 level.
news.summary: The memecoin frenzy on Pump.fun is declining, with the "graduation rate" dropping below 1% for the fourth consecutive week. In the past month, Pump.fun's token graduation rate has averaged around 1,500 tokens per week, significantly lower than previous rates. The platform's best week saw 1.67% of memecoins graduating, with 5,400 tokens entering the market in one week. Despite improving liquidity, memecoins are struggling due to waning investor interest. The US dollar weakening has not positively impacted memecoins, which continue to face challenges. The struggling memecoin market has contributed to a $1 trillion decline in crypto market capitalization, potentially leading to further declines in Bitcoin value.

news.headline: Invitation Homes (NYSE: INVH) declares $0.29/share quarterly cash dividend, payable by April 17, 2025, to shareholders as of March 27.
news.summary: Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.29 per share for its common stock shareholders. The dividend payment date is set on or before April 17, 2025, with stockholders of record as of March 27, 2025, eligible to receive the dividend. Invitation Homes is a leading single-family home leasing and management company in the U.S., providing quality housing solutions.

news.headline: NCA officer faces charges for alleged Bitcoin theft in 2017; 50 BTC stolen valued at $77,000 then and $4 million now.
news.summary: A National Crime Agency officer allegedly stole 50 BTC, which would have been valued at $77,000 in 2017 and is now worth $4 million.

news.headline: German parties reach agreement with Greens on debt package
FDA approves expansion of ILUVIEN label to treat uveitis; ANI Pharmaceuticals plans to market in US.ி
news.summary: ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc. disclosed on March 14, 2025, that the FDA has granted approval for an extended label of ILUVIEN (fluocinolone acetonide intravitreal implant) for the treatment of chronic non-infectious uveitis in the posterior segment of the eye. This approval encompasses various updates to the label such as the Warnings and Precautions section. ANI intends to market ILUVIEN for chronic NIU-PS alongside its existing approval for treating diabetic macular edema in the U.S. Outside the U.S., ILUVIEN is authorized for both DME and NIU-PS in seventeen European nations. ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc. trades on Nasdaq under ANIP.

news.headline: Eton Pharma's ET-600 passes pivotal bioequivalence study; NDA submission slated for April 2025.
news.summary: The recently conducted pivotal bioequivalence study confirmed the success of the company's patented desmopressin oral solution. This milestone paves the way for the submission of a New Drug Application (NDA) anticipated to be filed in April 2025. This significant development signifies a crucial step forward in the company's pharmaceutical innovation, with the potential to offer a novel treatment option in the near future.

news.headline: Hamas: We received a proposal from mediators to restart Gaza ceasefire negotiations and responded to it - Statement
EU urges countries to progress with capital markets reforms, stressing importance. #FinancialNews
Chemours partners with NTT DATA and Hibiya Engineering, Ltd. for Opteon™ 2P50 trial.
news.summary: Chemours, a company based in Wilmington, Del., has announced a collaboration with NTT DATA and Hibiya Engineering, Ltd. The partnership aims to conduct a full-scale trial of the Opteon™ 2P50 product. This joint effort signifies a significant step in promoting sustainable solutions, particularly within the chemical industry. The trial will involve testing the product on a larger scale to evaluate its effectiveness and potential impact. The collaboration seeks to capitalize on the combined expertise of the three companies to drive innovation and ecological advancements in the industry.

news.headline: Innovative Industrial Properties declares 1st quarter 2025 dividend of $1.90 per share, totaling $885 million dividends paid so far.
news.summary: In San Diego, Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. (IIP), the sole real estate firm listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol IIPR, specializing in the regulated U.S. cannabis sector, shared news of a first quarter 2025 dividend. The board of directors has approved a dividend of $1.90 per common stock share, equating to an annualized rate of $7.60 per common share. Notably, since establishment, IIP has disbursed a total of over $885 million in common stock dividends to investors.

news.headline: Dundee Precious Metals renews normal course issuer bid for common shares, purchased 11,028,569 shares under previous bid.
news.summary: Dundee Precious Metals Inc. (TSX: DPM) has announced its intention to renew its normal course issuer bid (the “New Bid”) on the Toronto Stock Exchange (“TSX”) to purchase certain common shares (“Shares”). The Previous Bid, initiated on March 18, 2024, will end on March 17, 2025. Under the Previous Bid, approval was granted to buy up to 15.5 million Shares, equivalent to approximately 9.8% of the public float by March 6, 2024. From the initiation until February 28, 2025, the Company bought back 11,028,569 Shares under the Previous Bid through TSX and alternative trading platforms at an average price of US$9.57 (Cdn $13.51) per Share.

news.headline: Weekly roundup from PR Newswire includes 13 consumer press releases, featuring Pizza Hut, Barbie™ G-SHOCK, and LG's new TV lineup.
news.summary: This week, noteworthy consumer and retail announcements were made via PR Newswire, featuring Pizza Hut introducing a charcuterie board, a new Barbie™ G-SHOCK partnership, and LG unveiling its latest TV lineup. The news was released on March 14, 2025, highlighting innovations and collaborations in the consumer and retail sectors. Keep tuned for the latest updates in this dynamic industry.

news.headline: Majority of UK Cabinet members push for Reeves to reconsider budget cuts, exceeding half of the total members.
Foreign strategists predict foreign investors may sell nearly $1 trillion worth of U.S. stocks.
Weekly finance roundup: 12 press releases, including Redfin's sale to Rocket& impact of caregiving on women investors.
news.summary: This week, significant financial updates were highlighted in press releases from PR Newswire. Key announcements included Redfin's acquisition by Rocket and a report on how caregiving duties affect the career progression of female investors. The news was shared on March 14, 2025, in New York. This update covered a wide array of financial insights, with a focus on these notable events. The transaction involving Redfin and Rocket grabbed attention due to its implications for the market. Additionally, the analysis of caregiving responsibilities shedding light on challenges faced by women investors offered valuable insights. The consistent flow of press releases from various sectors underscored the dynamism of the financial landscape.

news.headline: MRC Global reported Full Year 2024 results with $3,011M in sales, $78M net income. Q4 2024 saw $664M in sales, $1M net loss. CEO optimistic about 2025 outlook.
news.summary: The news article reports on MRC Global Inc.'s financial performance for the full year and fourth quarter of 2024. In 2024, the company reported operating cash flows of $268 million, sales of $3.011 billion, net income from operations of $78 million, and adjusted EBITDA of $202 million. The gross profit margin was 20.6% for the full year. In the fourth quarter of 2024, MRC Global reported operating cash flows of $73 million, sales of $664 million, and a net loss from operations of ($1) million. Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was $32 million with a gross profit margin of 20.3%.The company's CEO expressed optimism for 2025 due to business outlook, gas utilities business rebound, product pricing inflation, U.S. natural gas infrastructure growth, and expansion into new markets. Key financial goals for 2025 include generating $100 million in cash from operations and achieving a target net debt leverage ratio of 1.5x. MRC Global also announced a $125 million share buyback authorization.Additionally, the company's balance sheet showed a cash balance of $63 million, long-term debt of $387 million, and net debt of $324 million as of December 31, 2024. MRC Global's sales for the fourth quarter of 2024 were $664 million, with a segment breakdown for U.S. and international sales provided. The article includes detailed financial statements and metrics like adjusted net income, gross profit margin, operating income, and earnings per share.
